sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient admits to not drinking enough water and reports a history of kidney stones. He also states he consumes a high amount of beef and pork.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 110/70 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm and regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms and history are consistent with a possible recurrence of kidney stones, complicated by dehydration and dietary factors.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a 24-hour urine sodium collection to assess for sodium loss. Recommend a low-sodium diet, limiting beef, pork, and fish. Schedule a follow-up appointment in one week to assess response to treatment.
